title: Preparation of BG11 Medium for Cyanobacteria
author: Roscoff Culture Collection
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.s2pegdn

steps.instruction: Under hood, to 1L of sterile water, add 20 mL of Cyanobacteria BG-11 Freshwater Solution from Sigma Filter the medium on 0,2 microns BG11 medium Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C3061-500ML
Recipe for standard BG-11 media by Anna Behle
